_comment: TEMPLATE / EXAMPLE spec. Copy to <slug>.json, fill in real data, run scripts/generate_library_page_from_spec.py. The leading underscore keeps this from being mistaken for a real spec. Do NOT generate a page from this file.

intro: This page demonstrates the JSON spec shape consumed by generate_library_page_from_spec.py. Replace every field with real, researched content before generating.
